name_cn:
CALYPSO_White Elephant Leather
Made from imported Italian leather, it feels soft and smooth. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle hardware are all finished in matte gold. The bag features a magnetic snap closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables, with no other pockets for a minimalist design.
Size: 26×14×7cm
Model: 734153
